description_long: This is a single-bladed axe featuring a robust, dark metallic head with a slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard, giving it a traditional yet menacing appearance. The blade is adorned with faint red markings or stains, possibly decorative or suggestive of prior use. The handle is crafted from wood, displaying a rich brown hue with intricate carved patterns along its length, enhancing both grip and visual appeal. The lower portion of the handle is segmented with rounded, ergonomic grooves for improved handling and comfort. The axe head is securely mounted atop the handle, with visible metal wrapping or reinforcement at the joint. Overall, the object exudes a rugged, utilitarian aesthetic suitable for both functional and ornamental purposes in an urban environment.
description: A rugged, single-bladed axe with a dark, decorated metal head and a carved wooden handle featuring ergonomic grip grooves. The blade has red markings and the handle is reinforced at the top.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with its broad, dark blade and detailed wooden handle, highlighting the red markings and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, showing the circular cross-section of the handle and the thickness of the blade.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the axe reveals the blade's curvature and the full length of the carved handle.
description_view_3: A direct side view of the handle, emphasizing the carved patterns and the secure mounting of the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Wooden, straight handle with carved patterns and segmented ergonomic grip, rounded cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a curved edge, pronounced beard, and red decorative markings; flat poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metal reinforcement at the joint.
